## What this changes

A short description of the change and why.

## Checklist

- [ ] Keeps least privilege (no new permissions or hosts without a documented reason).
- [ ] Requests to ActBlue stay read-only `GET`s.
- [ ] No analytics, telemetry, third-party calls, or bundled dependencies added.
- [ ] No em-dashes in code, comments, docs, or commit messages.
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under "Unreleased" if the change is user-visible.
- [ ] Loaded unpacked and manually verified (popup shows alive while signed in,
      ended after sign-out).
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits.
